impact: This advances checkbox-126 without adding crawler/domain artifacts: the resumed checkbox-108 path now has a deterministic daemon-local policy for either superseding from existing checkbox-109 evidence or constraining any retry to one small preflightable file.
summary: Add a narrow checkbox-108 resume policy helper that gates resumed work on checkbox-122 through checkbox-125, detects checkbox-109 supersession evidence, and enforces a one-file syntax-preflightable retry shape.
target_task: Task checkbox-126: Task checkbox-126: Resume checkbox-108 only after checkbox-122 through checkbox-125 pass, and limit the resumed worker proposal to one file that is syntax-preflightable before full validation; if checkbox-109 already proves the checkpoint fixture contract, mark checkbox-108 superseded in the task board instead of adding domain artifacts.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
